scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Bottom center**: A blurred red vehicle (the Google Street View camera vehicle) is partially visible, showing motion blur, indicating it is moving forward along the road.  

### Road Surface & Markings  
- **Center to background (road)**: A single-lane asphalt road with a smooth, dark gray surface. White solid lines run along both the left and right edges of the road (separating the road from adjacent vegetation). No center line is visible. The road appears well-maintained.  
- **Driving side**: The road is oriented such that traffic moves on the left side (evidenced by the camera vehicle’s position relative to the left edge line, with no opposing traffic visible).  

### Vehicles & Plates  
- **Center background**: A red three-wheeled auto-rickshaw is moving forward in the same direction as the camera. It has a white front section and a visible driver (blurred). No license plate is readable.  

### Vegetation & Terrain  
- **Left side (from foreground to background)**: Dense green vegetation, including tall trees with thick trunks (some covered in vines or moss) and extensive undergrowth (bushes, shrubs). The vegetation forms a continuous, forest-like edge along the road.  
- **Right side (from foreground to background)**: An open grassy area with numerous tall palm trees (characterized by long, slender trunks and fronds at the top). In the far right background, patches of exposed red soil are visible beyond the palm trees.  
- **Terrain**: The ground is flat with no elevation changes. The sky is overcast and gray.  

### All Other Categories (Infrastructures, Text & Signs, Buildings, etc.)  
- **No visible infrastructure**: No utility poles, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, bollards, barriers, guardrails, or fences are present.  
- **No visible text or signs**: There are no road name signs, shop signs, banners, or stickers on poles.  
- **No visible buildings or architecture**: No structures (e.g., houses, walls, fences) are present.

details.name: auto-rickshaw
details.reason: The presence of a three-wheeled vehicle is highly characteristic of South or Southeast Asian countries.
details.focused_description: The auto-rickshaw is predominantly red with a black front section. It has a three-wheeled structure (one front wheel, two rear wheels), an enclosed cabin with a transparent/tinted canopy, and orange side indicator lights. The front features a single round headlight. The body appears to be made of metal and plastic, in operational condition with no visible damage. No text is visible on the object.

details.name: white road lines
details.reason: The road markings and driving side indicate left-hand traffic.
details.focused_description: The white road lines are straight, continuous lines painted on the asphalt road surface. They are white in color, run parallel to the edges of the road, and appear in good condition with no visible breaks or fading. One line is visible on the left edge of the road, and another on the right edge.

details.name: red soil
details.reason: Red soil is often found in tropical regions such as parts of India or Southeast Asia.
details.focused_description: The red soil is a long, irregularly shaped patch with a reddish-brown color, appearing rough in texture. It is located behind the grassy area and among the tree trunks.
